channel.title: AI-Generated Content on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in AI-Generated Content on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: AI‑Generated Fake Books Flood Apple Books Store
item.description: AI‑generated counterfeit books are flooding Apple Books, with fake titles appearing within hours, exposing platform security gaps and exploitation.

item.title: AI Slop Floods TikTok: 60% of Content is Machine-Generated Junk
item.description: New study reveals alarming percentage of AI-generated content on TikTok and YouTube, particularly targeting children. Discover implications for creators and platforms.
